3306390.name: Scrapbot Manual
3306390.description:
Dive into the levels, each with its own way of exploring and surviving. Starting with an open map, you can roam freely and bomb enemies from all angles. No matter where you are, one thing is certain: the enemies are many. From basic robots to elite units and cruel bosses, you need brains and bullets to survive.

Collect shiny diamonds from fallen enemies to level up and become more powerful. Each time you level up, you can choose from a pool of 31 random skills - including damage boosts, heals, buffs, passive upgrades, and more. Every run is different, and your skill choices really shape your body. Take down elite enemies or bosses and unlock lucky draws, rare and powerful skills that can completely change your playstyle.

Equip your robot with six pieces that each boost different stats - from attack and defense to critical chance and dodge. Are there any duplicates? Merge them to create a more powerful version and make the ideal load. Equipment can reach level 10, giving you plenty of room to grow.

Smooth directional movement, automatic shooting chaos, a satisfying screen-clearing explosion, and a simple yet deep progression system, RoboRogue is easy to pick up but full of depth. Whether you prefer compact dodging, minimal architecture, or just watching enemies explode in brilliant pixel fireworks, you'll feel right at home.

So, hop in, turn it on, and show the mechanical tribe who's boss. Your rogue robot journey begins now!
3306390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
